programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026
programme.desc: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg This Weekend
programme.desc: The news doesn't stop when markets close; hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend's biggest headlines, LIVE from New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.sub-title: Charlie Scharf, Wells Fargo CEO
programme.desc: Wells Fargo's CEO Charlie Scharf addresses his tenure in the position, regulatory issues and the changes within the financial industry during a conversation with David Rubenstein.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims; they discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business; she also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.sub-title: Charlie Scharf, Wells Fargo CEO
programme.desc: Wells Fargo's CEO Charlie Scharf addresses his tenure in the position, regulatory issues and the changes within the financial industry during a conversation with David Rubenstein.

programme.title: Bloomberg Chief Future Officer
programme.sub-title: Gina Goetter, Hasbro
programme.desc: Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro; she's the architect of the company's transformation, while diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Chief Future Officer
programme.sub-title: Pascal Desroches, AT&T
programme.desc: Chief Financial Officers now play a critical role in shaping corporate strategy and positioning organizations; profiling AT&T CFO Pascal Desroches, who has partnered with John Stankey to restructure the company.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.sub-title: Alexis Ohanian
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event; they discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.sub-title: Reese Witherspoon
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims; they discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business; she also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck to talk about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.sub-title: Sitting Down With the Newsoms
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California's First Couple, Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom: though the next presidential election is more than two years away, the governor is widely considered the frontrunner for the Democratic nomination, a position reinforced by his sometimes-gleeful attacks on President Donald Trump.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: How Emmanuel Acho Reinvents Himself
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, Speakeasy.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Best of the Bloomberg Women, Money & Power Event
programme.desc: Highlights of the event that brings together the most influential female voices in finance from around the world to discuss various business issues.

programme.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026
programme.desc: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: Airplane Thief
programme.desc: The Making of a Chinese Spy - Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China's spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.sub-title: Alexis Ohanian
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event; they discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.sub-title: Reese Witherspoon
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.sub-title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims; they discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business; she also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy
programme.sub-title: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Businessweek Convenes: Black Leaders Face the DEI Backlash
programme.desc: Bloomberg Businessweek hosts an exclusive roundtable with Black business leaders like Ursula Burns and Lisa Wardell to discuss the impact of DEI rollbacks across corporate America.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show

programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.
